title: Elytra Display
description: 3D Elytra when in an item frame
body:
A better way to show off your Elytra!



If you are using a custom Elytra texture, make sure to place the elytra_entity texture in...
Item Frame Elytra/assets/minecraft/textures/block
Otherwise you will only see the default elytra when it's on the ground or in a item frame.
